raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Declarative definition distinguishing Vision and Ideal as predictors of future self, in an inspirational/philosophical register",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Every person possesses both a Vision and an Ideal",
    "Vision functions as a reliable promise of future identity",
    "Ideal functions as a prophecy of eventual self-revelation",
    "Future selfhood is progressively unveiled rather than constructed"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent via parallel syntactic structure and consistent future-oriented metaphor, though the Vision/Ideal distinction is asserted rather than demonstrated",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Recipient seeks metaphorical language for personal aspiration and can map the terms onto actionable self-reflection",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "Taken as literal mechanism of self-realization or used to imply that holding an Ideal guarantees positive outcomes without effort"
}
